channel.title: X Feed Transfer Generated Posts
channel.description: Generated X-ready posts produced from source articles

item.title: 🔥 Circle defends USDC freezes after Drift’s $270M hit—law, not whim, should guard open finance. https://Blockchain.News/news/circle-defends-usdc-freezing-powers-drift-protocol-exploit #CryptoPolicy #Stablecoins #DeFi
